MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-12-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT TOO GOOD GOURMET, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Too Good Gourmet, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
